analysis:
【今日摘要】
今日市場情緒活躍，受美國政府多個高級安全機構發出新警告，關注網路安全威脅的影響，帕洛阿爾托網路系統股價大漲近 7%。道瓊未來指數上漲，但仍面臨關鍵阻力。高盛和CrowdStrike發生大幅的買盤動作。投資者應該關注Robinhood進入加密貨幣市場的新發展。AI 股票出現下滑趨勢，投資者對此感到擔憂。布洛德康股價上漲，部分原因是投資者轉向了從軟體公司轉向硬體製造商。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜和謹慎，避免被市場情緒左右。投資的目的是為了長期收益，而不是短期風險。投資者應該根據自己的風格和目標選擇合適的投資策略，並且保持持續學習和調整的態度。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA - NVIDIA 的技術優勢和市場領導地位使其成為人工智慧領域的重要玩家。
BROAD - 布洛德康 - 布洛德康的硬體製造能力和軟體公司轉向硬體的趨勢使其股價上漲。
CRWD - CrowdStrike - CrowdStrike 的安全軟體和服務使其成為網路安全領域的重要玩家。

items.title: Why Palo Alto Networks Stock Zoomed Almost 7% Higher Today
items.summary: Several top-level government security agencies issued a fresh warning about cyber threats.
items.zh_title: 帕洛阿爾托網路系統股價今日大漲近 7%
items.zh_point: 美國政府多個高級安全機構發出新警告，關注網路安全威脅，帕洛阿爾托網路系統股價因此大幅上漲。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise; Goldman, CrowdStrike Jump, But AI Stocks Need To Do This
items.summary: The Nasdaq and AI stocks rallied, but still face key resistance. Goldman and CrowdStrike make big bullish moves.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數上漲；高盛、CrowdStrike躍升，但AI股仍需突破關鍵阻力
items.zh_point: 道瓊未來指數和AI股漲升，但仍面臨關鍵阻力。高盛和CrowdStrike發生大幅的買盤動作。

items.title: Robinhood Just Launched a New Blockchain. Here's Why Investors Should Care.
items.summary: Robinhood's entry into crypto means there's a new top dog to beat.
items.zh_title: Robinhood 就發佈了一個新區塊鏈。投資者應該關心什麼？
items.zh_point: Robinhood 進入加密貨幣市場，意味著有新的強者出現，投資者應該關注這個新發展。

items.title: AI Stocks: Falling Knife or Once-in-a-Decade Buying Opportunity?
items.summary: AI stocks have slipped in recent weeks.
items.zh_title: AI 股票：跌落劍或一次十年難逢買機會？
items.zh_point: 最近幾周，AI 股票出現下滑趨勢。投資者對此感到擔憂，是否該趨之若鶩或避之如瘟？

items.title: Why Broadcom Stock Ticked Higher on Tuesday
items.summary: This was partially due to a broad investor pivot away from software companies into hardware makers.
items.zh_title: 為什麼布洛德康股價在星期二上漲
items.zh_point: 布洛德康股價在星期二上漲，部分原因是投資者轉向了從軟體公司轉向硬體製造商。

items.title: U.S. strikes Iran before Hormuz Strait blockade restarts
items.summary: President Donald Trump has said the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over following multiple flare-ups of hostilities in the region.
items.zh_title: 美國對伊朗進行打擊行動前伊朗封鎖霍爾木茲海峽將重新啟動
items.zh_point: 美國總統唐納德·川普表示，美國與伊朗的停火協議已經結束，該地區多次發生軍事衝突。

items.title: Stock futures are flat after soft inflation reading lifts market: Live updates
items.summary: Stocks climbed Tuesday after a cooler-than-expected inflation report bolstered hopes that the Fed may not need to raise interest rates as aggressively.
items.zh_title: 股市未來指數平穩，軟膠通膨數據提振市場
items.zh_point: 股市昨日上漲，軟膠通膨數據讓市場寄望美聯儲不需要大幅提高利率。

items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: Stocks closed higher on Tuesday, helped by signs of easing inflation, which boosted investor hopes that the Federal Reserve can hold off on rate hikes for the moment.
items.zh_title: 星期三的大股市故事：下一交易日市場可能會受到什麼影響
items.zh_point: 股市週二收盤升高，受通膨放緩的跡象所助，投資人認為美聯儲可能暫時不會提高利率。

items.title: Yum's Taco Bell removes select items, says no confirmed link to U.S. cyclosporiasis outbreak
items.summary: Yum Brands' Taco Bell said on Tuesday it had removed limited items from some restaurants as a precaution but said U.S. health officials have not linked the widening outbreak of cyclosporiasis to the chain or any specific food product.
items.zh_title: 塔可士力架將部分菜單移除　否認與美國細菌感染爆發有關
items.zh_point: 塔可士力架表示已將部分菜單移除作為預防措施，但美國衛生官員尚未確認該連鎖店或任何特定食物產品與目前的細菌感染爆發有關。

items.title: Jim Cramer says concerns about AI market froth are overblown. Here's why
items.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said today's stock market is far less concerning than it was during the dot-com bubble.
items.zh_title: 克拉默稱人工智慧市場泡沫關注過度
items.zh_point: 克拉默認為目前股市比過去的網路泡沫危機更為穩定，市場泡沫關注過度。

items.title: This overlooked index is a better investment than the S&P 500
items.summary: We did the math over a 30-year period, and it’s not even close.
items.zh_title: 這個被忽略的指數比標準普爾500指數更好投資
items.zh_point: 我們計算了30年內的數據，結果差距明顯。

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”
items.zh_title: 為什麼要等到70歲才領取社會保障？我的兄弟就是如此
items.zh_point: 一名男子在70歲時領取社會保障，但僅領取了一筆款項後便因癌症去世。這個故事讓他對政府鼓勵延遲領取福利的做法產生了質疑。

items.title: Your monthly Netflix bill is up 29% in just over a year. Critics say Washington needs to fix it.
items.summary: Netflix is still a Wall Street favorite — and a target for government regulators
items.zh_title: 你的Netflix月費已經上漲29%，超過一年。批評者認為華盛頓需要介入。
items.zh_point: Netflix仍然是華爾街的寵兒，但政府監管者卻將其視為目標。

items.title: Three powerful forces are draining family wealth — and your estate plan is completely unprepared
items.summary: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.
items.zh_title: 三大力量正在掠奪家庭財富 — 你的遺產計畫完全未準備好
items.zh_point: 醫療補助費用削減、退休金稅陷阱等三大威脅可能會毀滅你的家人的遺產，了解這些風險並做好準備是非常重要的。

items.title: What IBM’s profit warning means: Hardware is ‘eating everyone’s lunch’
items.summary: The company said the shortfall in its software and infrastructure business was tied to clients spending on memory ahead of price hikes.
items.zh_title: IBM的盈餘警告意味著硬體正在「吃掉」所有人的午餐
items.zh_point: IBM發布盈餘警告，指出軟體和基礎設施業務短缺與客戶在價格上升前購買記憶體相關。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，人工智慧基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價下跌超過10%，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所的金價和銀價在過去的交易中分別下跌1.4%和2.5%，這是金價連續下跌兩次，銀價連續下跌三次。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱通過低成本的方式訓練出高表現的AI模型，且不使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: DeepSeek 不會淹沒美國 AI 巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於 Nvidia、Broadcom 等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業回顧：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊產業的最新發展，包括市場趨勢、投資機會和產業動態。

items.title: Consumer Price Index: Inflation At 3.5% In June
items.zh_title: 消費者物價指數：六月通膨率達3.5%
items.zh_point: 美國政府公布的消費者物價指數顯示，六月通膨率為3.5%，表明美國經濟正在經歷一定程度的通膨。

items.title: Celebrus Technologies plc 2026 Q4 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation

items.zh_point: IBM發現一則虛假的AI新聞，可能涉及到對公司形象的攻擊或誤導。

items.title: Oil eases off day's highs after Trump nixes proposed 20% Strait of Hormuz transit fee
items.zh_title: 特朗普否決霍爾木茲海峽通行費案　石油價格回落
items.zh_point: 美國總統特朗普否決了對霍爾木茲海峽通行費的提案，石油價格因此暫時回落至當日高點之下。

items.zh_point: Phunware 發布 Form 13D/A 報告，內容未知。
